name: adb-mcp-premiere
description: AI Agent for Adobe Premiere Pro (Beta): 110 tools (project/media management, sequence assembly & three-point editing, transitions, effects & Lumetri color, keyframes, markers, audio mixing, transcripts/captions, frame export with visual feedback, encoder rendering) exposed to LLMs via the MCP protocol.
long_description: Fork of Mike Chambers' adb-mcp, extended to 110 Premiere Pro tools across project & media management, sequence creation and three-point editing, timeline assembly, video/audio transitions, effects and Lumetri color grading, keyframes, markers, audio mixing and fades, speech-to-text transcripts and captions, frame export the AI can see (visual feedback loop), and encoder-based rendering. Exposes Adobe Premiere Pro (Beta) to any MCP-capable AI client (e.g. Claude Desktop). Note: Premiere Beta 26.5 introduced breaking UXP API changes affecting timeline-write tools; see the repo FINDINGS doc.
